product.name: Dream Zone 750 Thread Count Pima Cotton 4 Pcs Queen Sheet Set in Silver Grey (Silver Grey,Queen)
product.description: Dress your bed in luxury with the Dream Zone 750-Thread-Count Pima Cotton Sheet Set Exquisitely made with Pima Cotton, a verified pure pima cotton, grown in the San Joaquin Valley, CA 750 thread count 100% sateen-weave Pima Cotton cotton for comfort Machine wash Purity of our extra-long and dense fibers make Pima Cotton softer, more durable, and more vibrant than regular cotton Never blended or contaminated Fully elasticized fitted sheet Twin sheet set includes: 77" W x 94" L flat sheet 39" W x 75" L fitted sheet 20" W x 28" L standard pillowcase Twin XL sheet set includes: 77" W x 99" L flat sheet 39" W x 80 L fitted sheet 20" W x 28" L standard pillowcase Full sheet set includes: 92" W x 94" L flat sheet 54" W x 75" L fitted sheet Two 20" W x 28" L standard pillowcases Queen sheet set includes: 98" W x 99" L flat sheet 60" W x 80" L fitted sheet Two 20" W x 28" L standard pillowcases King sheet set includes: 116" W x 99" L flat sheet 78" W x 80" L fitted sheet Two 20" W x 36" L king pillowcases California king sheet set includes: 116" W x 99" L flat sheet 72" W x 84" L fitted sheet Two 20" W x 36" L king pillowcases Fitted sheet fits mattresses up to 20" deep Lifetime manufacturer's warranty Imported
features: Dress your bed in luxury with the Dream Zone 750-Thread-Count Pima Cotton Sheet Set Exquisitely made with Pima Cotton, a verified pure pima cotton, grown in the San Joaquin Valley, CA 750 thread count. Purity of our extra-long and dense fibers make Pima Cotton softer, more durable, and more vibrant than regular cotton. Fully elasticized fitted sheet . Queen sheet set includes: 98" W x 99" L flat sheet 60" W x 80" L fitted sheet Two 20" W x 28" L standard pillowcases.

Pima Cotton Material: These sheets are made from Pima Cotton, which is a premium blend of Pima cotton. Pima cotton is known for its long and strong fibers, resulting in durable, soft, and comfortable sheets.
Queen Size: Clearly mention that this sheet set is designed specifically for Queen-sized beds, ensuring a perfect fit.
Color Option - Silver Grey: Emphasize that the sheets are available in a classic, elegant Silver Grey color that can easily match various bedroom decors.
Deep Pocket Design: Highlight that the fitted sheet has deep pockets, accommodating mattresses with a thickness of up to 18 inches, preventing the corners from slipping off.
